brief_nursing_elaboration: Liver enlargement from cirrhosis/infection/malignancy. Nursing: palpation assessment, abdominal girth monitoring, LFT assessment, fluid retention evaluation, portal hypertension monitoring.
Spleen enlargement from infection/hemolysis/malignancy. Nursing: abdominal palpation precaution, trauma prevention, CBC monitoring, left-sided pain assessment, splenic rupture precautions.
Kidney enlargement from hydronephrosis/polycystic disease. Nursing: renal function monitoring, back pain assessment, urinary obstruction evaluation, ultrasound coordination.
Heart chamber dilation from CHF/cardiomyopathy. Nursing: cardiac output monitoring, dyspnea assessment, diuretic admin, fluid restriction education, EF monitoring.
Elevated BP >140/90 mmHg chronically. Nursing: BP monitoring, antihypertensive efficacy, lifestyle modification education, target organ damage assessment, medication adherence.
Spontaneous/traumatic lung collapse from air entry. Nursing: O2 therapy, chest tube insertion support, breathing comfort, anxiety management, breath sound monitoring.
Pancreatic inflammation from alcohol/gallstones. Nursing: NPO status, pain management, lipase monitoring, insulin/enzyme supplementation, fluid management.
Brain inflammation from viral/bacterial infection. Nursing: neurological assessment q2-4h, fever management, seizure precautions, neuro imaging coordination.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's outer layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Pericardium inflammation causing chest pain/effusion. Nursing: chest pain assessment, pericardiocentesis support, cardiac monitoring, activity restriction.

literal_translation: Inflammation of the heart's inner layer
brief_nursing_elaboration: Endocardium infection (bacterial). Nursing: blood culture coordination, IV antibiotic admin, fever management, cardiac monitoring, sepsis precautions.
Elevated serum K+ >5.5 mEq/L from renal/medication. Nursing: ECG monitoring for peaked T-waves, calcium gluconate/insulin/glucose admin, potassium-sparing diuretic restriction.
Low serum Na+ <135 mEq/L from SIADH/excessive hypotonic fluids. Nursing: fluid restriction, hypertonic saline if symptomatic, seizure precautions.
Low serum Ca+ <8.5 mg/dL from hypoparathyroidism/renal disease. Nursing: calcium supplementation, vitamin D admin, seizure precautions, ECG monitoring for prolonged QT.
Blood glucose <70 mg/dL from insulin excess/skipped meals. Nursing: fast-acting carbohydrate admin, glucose monitoring, recheck in 15 min, glucagon if unable to eat.
Blood glucose >180 mg/dL from diabetes/infection. Nursing: insulin admin, blood glucose monitoring, fluid intake encouragement, DKA precautions.

literal_translation: Loss of consciousness from lack of oxygen
brief_nursing_elaboration: Airway obstruction causing respiratory failure/death. Nursing: airway clearance, rescue breathing, CPR coordination, high-flow O2, intubation readiness.

literal_translation: Process of stopping abnormal heart fibrillation
brief_nursing_elaboration: Electrical therapy to restore normal cardiac rhythm. Nursing: pad placement, synchronization settings, medication admin pre/post, patient safety during shock delivery.

literal_translation: Process of reviving from apparent death
brief_nursing_elaboration: CPR/rescue measures during cardiac/respiratory arrest. Nursing: chest compressions, rescue breaths, IV access, medications (epinephrine/atropine), defibrillation coordination.
Breast removal for cancer/prophylaxis. Nursing: body image support, pain management, lymphedema precautions, drain management, reconstruction options.
Stomach removal for cancer/ulcer. Nursing: post-op nutrition management, dumping syndrome precautions, vitamin supplementation, wound care.

literal_translation: Surgical opening of colon to skin
brief_nursing_elaboration: Bowel diversion with stoma creation. Nursing: ostomy care, appliance fitting, dietary guidance, skin protection, emotional support, rehabilitation.

prefix_meaning: Greek: ileum = part of small intestine
literal_translation: Surgical opening of ileum to skin
brief_nursing_elaboration: Small bowel diversion with stoma creation. Nursing: ostomy care, constant drainage expectations, skin barrier protection, appliance selection, dietary management, fluid monitoring.

literal_translation: Surgical opening of trachea to skin
brief_nursing_elaboration: Airway access via tracheal opening. Nursing: tracheostomy care, secretion removal, tube patency maintenance, humidification, cuff management, speaking valve consideration.
Larynx removal for cancer. Nursing: permanent tracheostomy care, speech rehabilitation (esophageal/laryngeal device), body image support, airway management.
Kidney removal for cancer/disease/donor. Nursing: post-op pain management, urine output monitoring, renal function assessment, remaining kidney function emphasis.
Spleen removal for trauma/ITP/disease. Nursing: post-op pain management, infection precautions (asplenic patient), pneumococcal/meningococcal vaccination, thrombosis risk.
Thyroid removal for cancer/hyperthyroidism. Nursing: post-op hypothyroidism monitoring, hormone replacement, calcium/parathyroid assessment, voice changes evaluation.
Uterus removal for cancer/fibroids/bleeding. Nursing: post-op pain management, body image/sexuality support, menopause symptoms if ovaries removed, wound care.

prefix_meaning: Latin: appendix = small tube attached to cecum
brief_nursing_elaboration: Appendix removal for acute appendicitis. Nursing: pre-op peritonitis assessment, post-op pain management, infection prevention, wound care, bowel function restoration.
Gallbladder removal for cholelithiasis/cholecystitis. Nursing: post-op pain management, bile duct patency, diarrhea management if common duct issues, dietary fat restriction initially.
Direct visualization of uterine cavity. Nursing: pre-op NPO status, post-op cramping management, bleeding assessment, infection precautions, follow-up scheduling.
Direct visualization of entire colon/rectum. Nursing: bowel prep completion verification, sedation monitoring, post-procedure reassurance, biopsy results review, perforation precautions.
Direct visualization of airways/lungs. Nursing: NPO status, throat numbing anesthetic, post-procedure sore throat management, sputum specimen collection, bleeding precautions.
Direct visualization of bladder interior. Nursing: dysuria management post-procedure, fluid intake encouragement, urine output monitoring, infection precautions, hematuria assessment.
Direct visualization of lower colon. Nursing: bowel prep, patient positioning, post-procedure reassurance, biopsy results review, perforation precautions.
Direct visualization of esophagus/stomach/duodenum. Nursing: NPO pre-procedure, sedation monitoring, sore throat post-procedure, biopsy results, bleeding precautions.
Minimally invasive visualization of abdomen/organs. Nursing: NPO status, CO2 insufflation management, post-op shoulder pain from gas, small abdominal cuts assessment.
Minimally invasive visualization of chest/lungs. Nursing: chest tube drainage monitoring post-procedure, breath sound assessment, pain management, respiratory status.
Minimally invasive visualization/treatment of joint. Nursing: post-op swelling management, ice application, compression, elevation, ROM exercises, arthrocentesis.
Visualization of ureter for stones/strictures. Nursing: dysuria management, urine output monitoring, stent placement care if applicable, infection precautions.
Radiographic visualization of bile ducts. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, iodine allergy assessment, post-procedure abdominal pain evaluation, pancreatitis precautions.
Radiographic visualization of vasculature with contrast. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, iodine/shellfish allergy assessment, catheter site care, limb neurovascular assessment.
Ultrasound imaging of organs/tissues. Nursing: coupling gel application, transducer positioning, patient privacy during exam, results scheduling, reassurance.
CT/CAT scan cross-sectional imaging. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, radiation exposure minimization, metallic object removal, patient positioning, anxiety management.
X-ray imaging of bones/organs. Nursing: radiation exposure minimization, protective lead shielding, proper positioning, pregnancy consideration, immobilization during imaging.
Infrared imaging detecting heat patterns. Nursing: room temperature consistency, proper patient preparation, inflammation/infection assessment, circulation evaluation.
Radiographic visualization of lymph nodes/vessels. Nursing: contrast reaction monitoring, allergic response assessment, limb elevation post-procedure, swelling evaluation.
12-lead heart rhythm recording. Nursing: electrode placement, patient reassurance, no movement during recording, result interpretation coordination, serial ECG comparison.
Brain wave recording detecting seizures/abnormalities. Nursing: electrode cap application, relaxation environment, sleep deprivation if required, seizure precautions during test.
